meta.description: Wild Rift Mid Lane champion data based on wildriftcounter.com matchups, Core tier lists, and community discussions

champions.name: Ahri

goodAgainst.name: Akali
goodAgainst.note: Can charm her out of shroud

avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy CC tanks (Galio, Kassadin)
champions.tips: Use charm to interrupt engages. Roam with ultimate advantage.

champions.name: Akali
champions.tips: Use shroud to outplay. Passive auto for extra damage.

champions.name: Akshan
champions.tips: Use grapple to roam. Passive revive is game-changing.

champions.name: Ambessa
champions.tips: Build sustain items. Dive backline in teamfights.

champions.name: Annie
champions.tips: Stack stun passive. Flash + Tibbers for engage.

champions.name: Aurelion Sol
champions.tips: Use E to roam. Stars do damage around you.

champions.name: Aurora
champions.tips: Position aggressively. Use mobility to dodge skillshots.

champions.name: Corki
champions.tips: Package is game-changing. Build hybrid damage.

champions.name: Diana
champions.tips: Use Q to poke, E to engage. Ultimate pulls enemies in.

champions.name: Ekko
champions.tips: Use W for shield/stun. R to undo damage.

champions.name: Fizz
champions.tips: Use E to dodge. Q through enemies for damage.

champions.name: Galio
champions.tips: Use ult to save teammates. Taunt into your team.

champions.name: Gragas
champions.tips: Use barrel to poke and slow. Ult to engage or disengage.

champions.name: Heimerdinger
champions.tips: Place turrets for vision and damage. Use grenade for stun.

champions.name: Irelia
champions.tips: Stack passive for DPS. Use Q to reset on minions.

champions.name: Jayce
champions.tips: Use ranged for poke, melee for burst. Combo forms.

champions.name: Karma
champions.tips: Mantra E for big shield + speed. Mantra Q for poke.

champions.name: Kassadin
champions.tips: Farm safely early. Late game ultimate spam.

champions.name: Katarina
champions.tips: Wait for CC before ulting. Resets are your win condition.

champions.name: Kayle
champions.tips: Survive early. Late game R for invulnerability.

champions.name: Kennen
champions.tips: Flash ult to stun team. Passive for stun stacks.

champions.name: Lucian
champions.tips: Win early lane. Roam with ultimate.

champions.name: Lux
champions.tips: Q + E + R is your kill combo. Shield before trades.

champions.name: Morgana
champions.tips: Black shield key targets. Long root to catch enemies.

champions.name: Nidalee
champions.tips: Land spears for damage. Use heal to sustain.

champions.name: Orianna
champions.tips: Ball placement is key. Ult when enemies are grouped.

champions.name: Pantheon
champions.tips: Use R to roam. Empowered W gives stun.

champions.name: Rumble
champions.tips: Manage heat for empowered abilities. Ult for zone control.

champions.name: Ryze
champions.tips: Use rune prison to lock down. Farm to scale.

champions.name: Seraphine
champions.tips: Double cast E for root, W for heal. Ultimate is game-changing.

champions.name: Singed
champions.tips: Proxy farm. Fling enemies into your team.

champions.name: Smolder
champions.tips: Stack passive for true damage. Position safely.

champions.name: Swain
champions.tips: Pull enemies into your team. Ult in teamfights.

champions.name: Syndra
champions.tips: Use Q + E for stun. Ultimate for execute.

champions.name: Talon
champions.tips: Use E to roam. Passive for bleed damage.

champions.name: Teemo
champions.tips: Place shrooms for vision. Blind key auto attackers.

champions.name: Tristana
champions.tips: Use E + auto for burst. W to jump/reset.

champions.name: Twisted Fate
champions.tips: Use R to roam. Pick gold card for stun.

champions.name: Veigar
champions.tips: Use cage to zone. Stack passive for AP.

champions.name: Vex
champions.tips: Passive fears dashed enemies. Ultimate for execute.

champions.name: Viego
champions.tips: Possess enemies for extra value. Build bruiser.

champions.name: Vladimir
champions.tips: Pool to dodge. Late game massive sustain.

champions.name: Yasuo
champions.tips: Stack Q for tornado. Ults require knockup setup.

champions.name: Yone
champions.tips: Second Q knockup. E for engage/disengage.

champions.name: Zed
champions.tips: Use shadows to outplay. Ultimate for execute damage.

champions.name: Ziggs
champions.tips: Use ultimate for waveclear or objectives. W to siege towers.

champions.name: Zoe
champions.tips: Use sleep to set up. Q + R for long range poke.

champions.name: Zyra
champions.tips: Place plants for poke. E + W + Q for combo.

draftRules.text: Assassins like Zed, Fizz, and Akali excel against immobile mages. Look for early kill pressure.
Control mages like Lissandra, Galio, and Vex counter assassins with CC and survivability.
Engage junglers pair well with burst/control mids like Ahri, Orianna, and Syndra for easy follow-up.
Galio is a strong counter to AP-heavy team comps. Consider an AD mid like Zed, Yasuo, or Lucian.
Tanky champions like Malphite and Galio can neutralize AD assassins with armor/MR and CC.
Scaling mids like Kassadin and Veigar struggle against early game roamers. Play safe and farm.
Vex's passive counters dash-heavy champions. Pick her into mobile team comps.
Squishy mages and assassins need frontline. Consider Galio or a tankier mid pick.
Global roamers will pressure side lanes. Warn your team and match their roams.
